description: Duplicate phase names → DUPLICATE_PHASE_NAME
input:
phase Baseline:
  sessions = 10
  VI60s

phase Baseline:
  sessions = 5
  EXT

description: use referencing undeclared phase → UNDEFINED_PHASE_REF
input:
phase Baseline:
  sessions = 10
  VI60s

phase Reversal:
  sessions = 10
  use Treatment

description: use with forward reference → UNDEFINED_PHASE_REF
input:
phase First:
  sessions = 10
  use Second

phase Second:
  sessions = 10
  VI60s

description: ProgressiveTraining with mismatched steps lengths → PROGRESSIVE_STEPS_LENGTH_MISMATCH
input:
progressive Train:
  steps x = [1, 2, 3]
  steps y = [10, 20]
  sessions = 5
  FI {x}s

description: ProgressiveTraining with empty steps list → PROGRESSIVE_EMPTY_STEPS
input:
progressive Train:
  steps v = []
  sessions = 5
  FI {v}s

description: ProgressiveTraining placeholder references undeclared variable → PROGRESSIVE_UNDEFINED_VARIABLE
input:
progressive Train:
  steps v = [2, 4, 8]
  sessions = 5
  FI {w}s

description: sessions = 0 → SESSION_NONPOSITIVE
input:
phase Test:
  sessions = 0
  EXT

description: sessions >= 0 → SESSION_NONPOSITIVE
input:
phase Test:
  sessions >= 0
  stable(visual)
  VI60s

description: Two session specs in one phase → DUPLICATE_SESSION_SPEC
input:
phase Test:
  sessions = 10
  sessions >= 5
  VI60s

description: Two stability specs in one phase → DUPLICATE_STABILITY_SPEC
input:
phase Test:
  sessions >= 10
  stable(visual)
  stable(cv, threshold=5%)
  VI60s

description: ProgressiveTraining-generated name collides with user-defined phase → DUPLICATE_PHASE_NAME
input:
phase Train_1:
  sessions = 5
  FR5

progressive Train:
  steps v = [10, 20]
  sessions = 5
  FR {v}

description: Constraint 74: interleave references an undeclared phase → UNDEFINED_PHASE_REF
input:
progressive DR:
  steps v = [1, 2]
  interleave Nonexistent
  sessions = 5
  FR {v}

description: Constraint 74: interleave with forward reference (phase declared after the progressive_decl) → UNDEFINED_PHASE_REF
input:
progressive DR:
  steps v = [1, 2]
  interleave Recovery
  sessions = 5
  FR {v}

phase Recovery:
  sessions >= 3
  stable(visual)
  FR5

description: Constraint 75: interleave references its own enclosing progressive_decl label → PROGRESSIVE_SELF_INTERLEAVE
input:
progressive DR:
  steps v = [1, 2]
  interleave DR
  sessions = 5
  FR {v}

description: Constraint 63b: user-declared phase collides with an interleave-generated clone label → DUPLICATE_PHASE_NAME
input:
phase Recovery:
  sessions >= 3
  stable(visual)
  FI60s

phase Recovery_after_DR_1:
  sessions = 1
  EXT

progressive DR:
  steps v = [1, 2]
  interleave Recovery
  sessions = 5
  FR {v}

description: Constraint 77: at most one `advance when` per progressive_decl → DUPLICATE_PROGRESSIVE_ADVANCE
input:
progressive FI_Training:
  steps v = [2, 4, 8]
  advance when criterion(metric="rate", threshold=>=10, window=3 sessions)
  advance when manual
  FI {v}s

description: Constraint 78: criterion metric not in standard registry → UNDEFINED_CRITERION_METRIC
input:
progressive Training:
  steps v = [1, 2]
  advance when criterion(metric="wakawaka", threshold=>=5, window=2 sessions)
  FR {v}

description: Constraint 79: advance when criterion(...) with sessions = N (exact) → ADVANCE_FIXED_SESSIONS_CONFLICT
input:
progressive FI_Training:
  steps v = [2, 4, 8]
  advance when criterion(metric="rate", threshold=>=10, window=3 sessions)
  sessions = 5
  FI {v}s

description: Constraint 79 exception: `advance when manual` + `sessions = N` is legal (exception to fixed-sessions conflict)
input:
progressive Omission_Training:
  steps ratio = [5, 10, 20]
  advance when manual
  sessions = 3
  FR {ratio}
expected_note: No error — manual advancement documented alongside observed session duration. This is the §79 explicit exception.

description: Constraint 80: single-step progressive_decl with advance_when → ADVANCE_SINGLE_STEP (WARNING, not error)
input:
progressive FI_Single:
  steps v = [5]
  advance when criterion(metric="rate", threshold=>=10, window=3 sessions)
  FI {v}s
expected_note: Vacuous advance condition (no second step to advance to). Accepted but flagged.
